reach_why: Combines known concerns about compression, novelty, and evaluator bias; little evidence of wholly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links schema loss, lexical familiarity, recursive LLM evaluation, and resistant true premises into one critique.
falsifiable_why: Claims can be tested by comparing external-grounded evaluations against recursive pipelines and measuring lost asymmetry effects.
explanation: Compact LLM self-evaluation can seem insightful while masking loss, bias, and unproven novelty.
